name: getProfileFloat
title: getProfileFloat
syntax: float getProfileFloat(char section[], char entry[], long def, char filename[]); // form 1
description: Searches the file filename under section section for the variable entry. If its value is a number, this number is returned as the functional result. If the file or entry is not found, or if entry does not contain a valid number, the default value def is returned as the functional result.

parameters.name: section
parameters.description: Section of the file as a string.
